name: Parsley & Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine all ingredients except the salt, pepper, chives, and parsley.
2. Cover the pot and bring to a boil.
3. Lower heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. Cool slightly, then puree the soup.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Garnish with chives and parsley.
